item.title: New York official urges investors to block ExxonMobil’s Texas move
item.description: City comptroller Mark Levine, who manages pension fund holding ExxonMobil shares, says proposed move from New Jersey would weaken shareholder rights

item.title: Long journey back from global energy crisis, says Shell CEO
item.description: Wael Sawan says disruption caused by Iran war has already reduced global jet fuel demand by about 5%

item.title: ‘Easy wells are gone’: Industry backs 20k as driver of US Gulf growth
item.description: Operators need more affordable standardised next-gen subsea gear as high-pressure, high-temperature operations become the norm

item.title: SBM chief says Middle East conflict could 'strengthen' core market
item.description: Chief executive Oivind Tangen hints at Iran war upside as it upgrades revenue guidance and plans replacement installation vessel

item.title: Neo Next+ agrees $9.8 million takeover of Deltic
item.description: Deal follows a failed takeover bid announced last August

item.title: ExxonMobil seeks environmental licence for ninth Guyana project
item.description: Haimara discovery will anchor the next Stabroek block development

item.title: 'More exploration running room': ExxonMobil eyes gas potential in East Med, Greece and Algeria
item.description: ExxonMobil’s vice president of exploration and new ventures, John Ardill, tells OTC 2026 conference of the importance of ‘casting a broad net’

item.title: Significant M&A opportunity still exists in Norway, says Aker BP chief
item.description: Aker BP chief executive says there will be “a consolidation game” offshore Norway

item.title: EU weighs up suspending flaring penalties amid global energy disruptions
item.description: EU methane regulations due to take effect from 2027

item.title: Former Expand Energy CEO finds a new home in Oklahoma City
item.description: Nick Dell’osso, who abruptly left US shale producer in February, lands top job at Gulfport Energy

item.title: Chevron wins exploration deal in neglected Malta
item.description: Chevron move could further boost supermajor's Mediterranean exploration portfolio

item.title: Norwegian operator locks in more time with deepwater rig
item.description: Vaar Energi exercises option on one of its two contracted COSL rigs

item.title: QatarEnergy extends force majeure for key European customer as Strait of Hormuz disruption bites
item.description: QatarEnergy in March declared force majeure on its LNG buyers, days after its facilities were hit during a drone attack

item.title: Harbour progresses towards end-of-year FEED for Mexico projects
item.description: UK-based company also agrees to divest 5% interest in Zama project

item.title: End of life for UK North Sea oilfield
item.description: Lancaster oilfield was brought on stream in June 2019

item.title: ‘Exceptional’: Eni’s latest giant gas discovery delivers in spades
item.description: Accelerated development of third offshore Indonesia hub planned

item.title: Shell beats forecasts on higher upstream and trading performance
item.description: Earnings supported by trading and upstream realised prices

item.title: Iraq cheers what it asserts is giant oil discovery by Chinese operator
item.description: A wildcat on the Qurnain block may have hit in place resources of over 8.8 billion barrels of oil

item.title: Iraq cheers Chinese operator's giant oil find claims
item.description: Well drilled on Qurnain block may have hit in place resources of over 8.8 billion barrels of oil

item.title: Iraq cheers Chinese operator's giant oil discovery
item.description: Well drilled on Qurnain block may have hit in place resources of over 8.8 billion barrels of oil

item.title: Woodside moves to secure exploration acreage in Angola's final frontiers
item.description: Australian player eyes ultra-deepwater acreage in Benguela and Namibe basins

item.title: Middle East upheaval heralds sea change in global oil sourcing
item.description: Broad consensus that effective closure of Strait of Hormuz is not a one-off event

item.title: Middle East’s pivotal risk shift to spur crude supply diversification
item.description: Broad consensus that effective closure of Strait of Hormuz is not a one-off event

item.title: Middle East’s pivotal risk shift could spur crude supply diversification
item.description: Broad consensus that effective closure of Strait of Hormuz is not a one-off event

item.title: ExxonMobil cleared for decommissioning offshore Australia
item.description: Phase 1 involves removal of 13 platforms and upper jacket sections, starting in third quarter

item.title: Chinese contractor delivers multi-functional jack-up platform for Bohai Bay
item.description: CNOOC will deploy platform to boost production offshore China

item.title: Contractor line-up revealed for $8 billion Middle East gas megaproject
item.description: Bab Gas Cap development would potentially unlock three undeveloped gas-cap reservoirs in Abu Dhabi, with output routed to the new facility

item.title: Why US shale’s fracking techniques may move offshore to harvest more resources
item.description: Department of Energy’s Kyle Haustveit says hydraulic fracturing could boost recovery rates and extend life of ageing offshore platforms

item.title: Low activity points to US Gulf production decline, executive says
item.description: Beacon Offshore vice president says US Gulf activity at all-time low despite record output

item.title: Kazakh oil company seeks partners as drilling programme proceeds
item.description: Authorities have tasked KazMunayGaz with discovering more oil and gas to underpin future energy security of Kazakhstan
